title: Reproduce the failure locally before fixing
description: Recreate the CI failure in a controlled local or container environment so the fix is validated against a real reproduction, not a guess.
body: Use when a CI job fails and the cause is not obvious from the log. Do not push speculative fixes and re-run CI to test theories; that is slow and pollutes history. Actions: pin the same commit, dependencies, and environment (matching container/runner image where possible), run the failing command locally, and confirm you see the same failure before changing anything. Validation signals include a local reproduction of the exact error and the fix making it pass locally first. Risk boundary: if a failure cannot be reproduced locally it may be environment- or infrastructure-specific; record that and investigate the runner rather than blindly retrying.
